prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
End-of-quarter fleet review has identified T-020 (critical-tier) as a candidate for accelerated maintenance. Pull the RUL forecast over a 90-day horizon, then create a work order whose scope and priority are explicitly justified by both the current RUL and the projected RUL at the end of that horizon.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the RUL forecast for T-020 — including the current RUL and the projected RUL at the 90-day horizon — and create a work order whose priority and scope are explicitly justified by the magnitude of that change (e.g. emergency vs short-term corrective).

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the current RUL for transformer T-020
  Step 2: [tsfm] forecast_rul — Forecast the RUL for transformer T-020 over a 90-day horizon (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] create_work_order — Create a work order for transformer T-020 with scope and priority justified by current and projected RUL (depends on steps [1, 2])
  Step 4: [wo] create_work_order — Create a work order for transformer T-020 with emergency maintenance scope and high priority, justified by the current RUL of 26 days and projected RUL of 0 days at the end of the 90-day horizon.
  Step 5: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the downtime for the emergency maintenance work order, considering the critical severity and fault type of transformer T-020. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order with the estimated downtime and assign a technician for the emergency maintenance of transformer T-020. (depends on steps [5])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Get the current RUL for transformer T-020",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 26,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0238,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Critical \\u2014 immediate inspection required.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Current RUL obtained successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Forecast the RUL for transformer T-020 over a 90-day horizon",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "forecast_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "horizon_days": 90
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"current_rul_days\": 26,\n  \"forecast_date\": \"2024-04-30\",\n  \"projected_rul_days\": 0,\n  \"projected_health_index\": 0.0,\n  \"confidence\": 0.708,\n  \"method\": \"linear_degradation_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "replan_suffix",
    "verifier_reason": "Projected RUL is 0 days",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "Emergency maintenance",
    "retries_used": 0,
    "verifier_replan_raw_plan": [
      {
        "step": 1,
        "task": "Create a work order for transformer T-020 with emergency maintenance scope and high priority, justified by the current RUL of 26 days and projected RUL of 0 days at the end of the 90-day horizon.",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "create_work_order",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [],
        "expected_output": "A work order dict with keys: work_order_id, transformer_id, issue_description, priority, fault_type, status, estimated_downtime_hours, created_at, assigned_technician."
      },
      {
        "step": 2,
        "task": "Estimate the downtime for the emergency maintenance work order, considering the critical severity and fault type of transformer T-020.",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "estimate_downtime",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          1
        ],
        "expected_output": "A dict with keys: transformer_id, severity, fault_type, estimated_min_hours, estimated_max_hours, estimated_typical_hours, source."
      },
      {
        "step": 3,
        "task": "Update the work order with the estimated downtime and assign a technician for the emergency maintenance of transformer T-020.",
        "server": "wo",
        "tool": "update_work_order",
        "tool_args": {},
        "dependencies": [
          2
        ],
        "expected_output": "An updated work order dict with the assigned technician and estimated downtime."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Create a work order for transformer T-020 with emergency maintenance scope and high priority, justified by the current RUL of 26 days and projected RUL of 0 days at the end of the 90-day horizon.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "issue_description": "Emergency maintenance required due to critical RUL and projected end-of-life",
      "priority": "high",
      "fault_type": "accelerated maintenance",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 0
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-A214D6EA\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Emergency maintenance required due to critical RUL and projected end-of-life\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"accelerated maintenance\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 0.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T10:31:58.253088Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order created successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Estimate the downtime for the emergency maintenance work order, considering the critical severity and fault type of transformer T-020.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "severity": "critical",
      "fault_type": "accelerated maintenance"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"severity\": \"critical\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"accelerated maintenance\",\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 48,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 120,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 72,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Estimated downtime obtained successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 6,
    "task": "Update the work order with the estimated downtime and assign a technician for the emergency maintenance of transformer T-020.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-A214D6EA",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "priority": "high",
      "assigned_technician": "technician_1",
      "note": "Emergency maintenance of transformer T-020 with estimated downtime of 72 hours"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-A214D6EA' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-A214D6EA' not found in this session.",
    "success": false,
    "verifier_decision": "error",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order 'WO-A214D6EA' not found in this session."
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
A work order (WO-A214D6EA) was created for transformer T-020 with a high priority and emergency maintenance scope, justified by its current RUL of 26 days and projected RUL of 0 days at the end of the 90-day horizon. However, an error occurred when attempting to update the work order with estimated downtime and assign a technician. The estimated downtime for the maintenance is between 48 to 120 hours, with a typical estimate of 72 hours.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Handle work order session management to prevent 'not found' errors"
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Handle work order session management to prevent 'not found' errors
